untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a specific 3-day cyclical pattern and precise identification of 'buying day objective' (day 1 of cycle), which requires pattern recognition logic not expressible through simple indicator comparisons. Additionally, 'higher tops and bottoms' requires multi-bar comparative analysis beyond allowed operators. The cyclic pattern detection and reversal identification from price declining to rallying requires custom pattern logic.
translation_notes: Approximated uptrend condition using price above SMA_20 and recent price increase (close > prev_close) as proxy for 'prices stop declining before rally begins'. This is a simplified interpretation of the complex 3-day cycle pattern described in the source material. The true signal intent (identifying specific day 1 of a 3-day rhythm cycle) cannot be fully captured with the allowed indicators and operators.
